summary: The diff implements all 7 requirements related to adding negative prompt presets for Stable Diffusion. A new constants file defines 5 preset options with comprehensive keyword mappings. The frontend form, state management, display component, and mutation hook all integrate the negativePromptPreset parameter. The backend PoseCriteria type was updated with a negativePrompt field, and a migration.mo file was created for backward compatibility. However, the implementation has gaps in prompt generation logic and migration functionality.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the prompt generation logic in App.tsx to append the selected negative prompt preset text to the generated comprehensive prompt
missing_requirements.reason: The generatePrompt function in App.tsx only builds the positive prompt and does not append the negative prompt text. While ImageDisplay.tsx has a getFullPromptWithNegative() helper that combines them, the core generatePrompt logic specified in REQ-16 was not modified to include negative prompt integration.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create a migration.mo file to handle upgrading existing PoseCriteria records to include the new negativePrompt field with a default empty string value
missing_requirements.reason: The migration.mo file exists but does not actually transform PoseCriteria records or add the negativePrompt field. The run() function only returns the poseCriteriaSet unchanged without performing any migration logic on individual records.
